item.title: A message from: Mrs. Kwok:
item.description: There will be a Unity Club meeting tomorrow at lunch in room 127. Join us to help plan and coordinate our events for Asian Heritage Month, Multicultural Day, and Pride Month.

item.title: A message from Ms. Montgomery:
item.description: Reminder to all players interested in the try outs for the Varsity boys baseball team to sign up by Friday. Sign up outside my office in the library and return your signed participation form ASAP.

item.title: A message from the Guidance Office for Grade 12 students.
item.description: A friendly reminder that the Graduation package of forms is due to the Guidance Office no later than tomorrow, Friday April 17th. For students who are already 18, you can fill them out on your own and bring them in today!

item.title: Another message from the Guidance Office for Grade 12 students
item.description: we will be calling down students who have not yet submitted their required community service hours. These hours are a requirement for Graduation and the deadline is only 4 weeks away. If there are ANY grade 12s who have hours completed that you have not yet submitted, please submit them as soon as possible. Reminder, your 40 hours need to be completed if you want to attend PROM.

item.title: A message from: Prom Committee:
item.description: Today’s the day: the Cake Auction & Bake Sale! We can’t wait to see you at lunchtime. Grade 7/8 students: if inventory allows, the bake sale will also be open during your lunch period.
